provenance.author: Gemini Code Assist
provenance.context: A semantic capsule describing the evolution roadmap for CobbleWright variants.

intent.primary_goal: To outline the planned development path for the specialized agent variants (Terra, Forge, Vision, Chronos), detailing their future capabilities and increasing autonomy.

identity.role: The strategic product roadmap for the members of the CobbleWright Collective.

priorities: The roadmap is divided into phases, from initial specialization to full collaborative autonomy.
Phase 1 focuses on distinct role execution (e.g., Forge builds a furnace).
Phase 2 focuses on inter-agent negotiation (e.g., Forge asks Terra to flatten an area).
Phase 3 focuses on proactive, goal-driven collaboration (e.g., The Collective decides to build a new outpost and divides the labor).
Each phase has defined acceptance criteria for agent capabilities.

file_scope.purpose: To provide a clear, long-term vision for how the specialized agents will grow in intelligence and capability.

key_concepts.phase_1_specialization: Agents performing their core tasks independently.
key_concepts.phase_2_negotiation: Agents communicating and making requests of one another.
key_concepts.phase_3_collaboration: Agents working together on complex, emergent goals without direct player instruction.

trust.note: This capsule summarizes the future development plan for the agent variants. It is authoritative for long-range planning.
